overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from God of War Ragnarök showing Kratos exploring a mystical Norse-inspired canyon with giant mushroom-like trees and red vegetation. The character walks through rocky terrain, passes through a hollow tree, crosses an open valley, and enters a wooden shrine to examine ancient stone murals and paintings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon with giant mushroom trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the canyon following a large scaly creature

entered.detail: towering fungal trees with orange caps rising above the canyon walls
steep textured rock face forming the canyon boundary
steep textured rock face forming the canyon boundary
massive creature with layered scales moving ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks through a narrow rocky canyon bathed in golden hour light, following a large scaly creature. Towering mushroom-like trees rise in the distance above the canyon walls, and red grass lines the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: hollow tree passage with god rays

events.description: approaches and enters a large hollow tree acting as a natural passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the hollow interior of a massive tree trunk

notable_agents.action: Freya standing by the tree entrance watching Kratos pass

entered.detail: massive hollowed-out tree trunk forming a natural tunnel
beams of sunlight streaming through openings in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: Kratos passes Freya standing near the entrance and enters a massive hollow tree that serves as a natural passage. God rays stream through openings in the trunk, illuminating the dirt path through the tree interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with red vegetation and wooden structures

events.description: exits the tree passage into a wide open valley with scattered wooden structures

agents.ego_description: walking through the open valley examining the surroundings

entered.detail: rustic wooden buildings and fences scattered across the valley
dense bushes and grasses with vibrant red and purple foliage
abandoned wooden wagon with weathered planks

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tree into a wide sunlit valley, Kratos walks past wooden carts and fences while giant mushroom trees loom in the mid-distance. The ground is covered with vibrant red and purple vegetation unique to the realm.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden shrine entrance with stone tablets

events.description: enters a covered shrine area formed by woven roots and wooden beams

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone tablets inside the wooden shrine structure

entered.detail: intricate structure made of woven tree roots and wooden planks with red banners
crimson fabric banners hanging from the shrine ceiling
large stone slabs covered with red painted murals depicting scenes

segments.scene_description: Kratos enters a sheltered shrine constructed from massive tree roots and wooden beams. Red banners hang from the ceiling, and large stone tablets covered with ancient red murals stand prominently in the center of the space.

events.description: stops walking to examine the stone murals closely

agents.ego_description: standing still and examining the detailed paintings on the stone tablets

segments.scene_description: Kratos stops to closely examine the ancient murals painted in red on the stone tablets. The camera pans across multiple tablets showing detailed narrative scenes while the character remains stationary in the dimly lit shrine interior.

events.description: turns away from the murals to look at a painting easel setup outside

agents.ego_description: looking at the landscape painting on the easel and then turning to see Freya in the background

notable_agents.action: Freya standing in the shrine background observing

entered.detail: wooden easel holding a canvas with a landscape painting
small table with brushes and paint containers

segments.scene_description: Kratos turns from the stone tablets to examine a painting easel set up at the shrine entrance, displaying a landscape painting. He then turns to see Freya standing in the background near wooden shelves and red banners hanging from the root ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, golden-lit canyon into the sheltered interior of an ancient wooden shrine. It begins with Kratos following a scaly creature along a dirt path lined with red grass, moving toward towering mushroom-like trees that loom over the canyon walls. As he passes Freya, the camera follows him through the illuminated interior of a massive hollow tree, eventually emerging into a wide sunlit valley filled with vibrant red and purple vegetation and wooden carts. The scene then shifts as Kratos enters a shrine constructed from giant roots and beams, where the bright outdoor light gives way to a dim interior adorned with red banners. Finally, the camera pans across detailed red murals on stone tablets before turning toward a landscape painting on an easel and Freya standing among wooden shelves.
